capabilities: Combine workflow orchestration with software architecture insights to create a unified execution procedure, ensuring consistency and efficiency.

procedure.action: Reconcile artifacts from workflow orchestration and software architecture by applying domain-specific tooling; ensure all key fields are aligned and log discrepancies to audit trail by applying field-level structural comparison on shared key fields; flag conflicts where hash(A.field) != hash(B.field) and log to conflict_log; assert merge_error_count < 1.
Assert merged output by using domain-appropriate tooling to assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Filter candidate workflows using domain-specific tooling; ensure error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Assign results by leveraging domain-appropriate tooling; confirm error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Log all operations with timestamps and result codes to an audit trail for traceability and future analysis, ensuring compliance with domain standards using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

summary: Integrate insights from workflow orchestration and software architecture knowledge bases by merging shared steps and aligning workflows for cohesive execution.
title: Workflow Orchestration Knowledge Base Composition

failureConditions: Inconsistent data when merging omits NULL handling, causing referential integrity violations in downstream consumers.
Increased error rates when validation steps are skipped, leading to unreliable workflow execution.
Operational delays when logging mechanisms fail, causing incomplete audit trails and hindering traceability.
metrics: merged output by using domain-appropriate tooling to assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true
